wharf rat  

Animal
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 24th, 2007

Category: EverQuest

Minimum Level: 11
Maximum Level: 16
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Crude Defiant Chain Gauntlets
Raw Rough Hide
Sharp Tooth

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Rat Teeth

Report a correction

Post Comment
Drop
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2004 at 1:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591811775181
View User Forum
Scholar
116 posts
Drops the "Sharp Tooth" which is given to Thalith

Sharp Tooth
LORE ITEM NO DROP
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE

Note: Only drops from the wharf rat inside the building next to Raarrk

Edited, Sat Nov 27 13:58:59 2004

I'm lvl 9, and these things con yellow to me. I can take them easily one-at-a-time if I use my lvl 8 pet. :)

I am a lev 13 chanter, the rat who dropped the sharptooth conned yellow to me and the rest were dark blue. These guys are easy if you root then dot/nuke them.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 04 2001 at 9:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) scary!!!!!
Level on the Rats
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 10:59 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was there last night and I will end the debate. At level 15 most conned even, some blue. I would guess a 13-15 lvl range.
▲ Page top
The Fangtooth Quest
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2001 at 5:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757228554
Scholar
43 posts
To Clarify a few points that are missed or poorly presented.

The rats which drop the "Sharp Tooth" spawn inside the large building near the 2 docks. Spawn time is approximately 6 minutes, and these rats run 15-16. Every 8-10 rats, Fangtooth will spawn. He's appearantly identical to the others in all aspects +1 level.

Once you get a tooth, step outside and face the beach. On the dock to your right you will find Thalith Mamluk. Give the toothe over for...

-Fishbone Necklace : 2AC 3AGI wght 0.5 All/All.
-High-Newbie quest experience.
-Kerra Isle faction improves.

Wharf rats of a much lower level (8-12?) spawn on the beach, but I have yet to obtain a tooth from these.

BE WARNED : These Rats are Monks, with all the associated skills for that level range... Strike(tiger claw) Block and Dodge specifically. As such they also land their attacks much more frequently than other creatures of their level.. with melee damages running to the high 20s.
▲ Page top
Level WAY off?
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2001 at 8:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754880570
Scholar
17 posts
Theres another warf rat inside one of the huts that conned blue to me at lvl 20. It wasn't Sharptooth.

Anonymous
Fifteen warrior and this little rat conned blue to me. Same as a Gnoll elite gaurd. go figure.

▲ Page top
The Facts
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2001 at 8:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750062575
56 posts
it cons even at fourteen but if your not twinked and or buffed your dead . it hits for twenties
i bring a friend to buff me and i kill these bastids at level eight on up to fifteen .I get NICE exp with the turning in of the "A Sharp Tooth" to the Kerran on the dock-Thalith; I think, is his name. I see its called a wharf rat but its known as the fang tooth quest
even though this rat spawns only 10% of the time as Fang Tooth and 90% of the time as A Wharf Rat (same loot on both A Sharp Tooth) youll get great exp from this and good faction from kerrans which will help when you start killing them
▲ Page top
Quest Rat in building
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2000 at 12:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
One of the Rats inside a large building near the wharf is the one used for the Rat Teeth Quest; he consistently drops the Tooth while no others do. He always spawns and stays inside.
His level is always 15, and he hits hard, often between 28 to 32 damage.
▲ Page top
miny rats!
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2000 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
lol this things are amusing.they hit for nice dmg actually 10-20..there really is no named one though.all of em are wharf rats.Just go kill all you see you will loot the tooth after the 2nd or 3rd rat..then you can get that crap necklace Woot!

# Oct 04 2001 at 8:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245915232
14 posts
At level 20, mobs 15-19 are blue. So this means at least above *14*. Sharptooth is probably 15 as stated in other posts.
▲ Page top
rrrats
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2000 at 10:42 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
These little guys are far from level 1. The regular ones have about 200 hits and drop nothing. Sharptooth has about 300 hits and drops the tooth Thalith Mamluk wants. The reward is the Fishbone Necklace, AC3, +2 Agility, plus faction for KerraIsle. Not bad for a rat.
